signals.headline: Ethereum Price Surge Confirmed: Up ~4-4
signals.raw:
Ethereum Price Surge Confirmed: Up ~4-4.5% to $2,403 on Apr 22** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][4][6]

Ethereum's price rose $98.74 (+4.3%) from Apr 21 ($2,305) to Apr 22 (9:15 a.m. ET, $2,403.78), aligning with reports of 2.7-4.57% 24h gains[1][3][4][6]. No specific new confirmations, announcements, or resolutions (e.g., Pectra upgrade still in testing per Apr 17-18 video; no fresh regulatory news) d
